sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74798" key="o)reia/lwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρειάλωτος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74798.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wandering on the mountains,</tr_> condemned by Thom.Mag. p. 267 R.</sense> </entryFree>
